questions.question: What are the primary advantages of using Hadoop over traditional relational databases (RDBMS) for big data analytics?
questions.hint: Explain the key differences between Hadoop and RDBMS

questions.question: How does Hadoop handle data distribution and parallel processing, and what are the benefits of this approach?
questions.hint: Focus on the key concepts of MapReduce and data distribution

questions.question: What are some common use cases for Hadoop in big data analytics, and how does it compare to other big data technologies?
questions.hint: Explain the applications of Hadoop in data warehousing, data mining, and data integration
